title: BEM-871 validate curator response
objective:
Run script:
"""
resp = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM871_CURATOR_MEDIATED_RESPONSE.md')
internal = Path('governance/audit/internal/results/BEM871_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_RESULT.md')
protocol = Path('governance/protocols/CURATOR_MEDIATED_INTERNAL_AUDIT_PROTOCOL.md')
text = resp.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if resp.exists() else ''
lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
final = 'APPROVED_WITH_NOTES' if 'Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES' in lines else ('BLOCKED_WITH_REASON' if 'Status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON' in lines else '')
has_sections = all(token in text for token in ['Findings:', 'Evidence:', 'Recommendation:'])
if resp.exists() and internal.exists() and protocol.exists() and final and has_sections:
    status = 'CURATOR_MEDIATED_RESPONSE_CONFIRMED_' + final
else:
    status = 'CURATOR_MEDIATED_RESPONSE_INCOMPLETE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM871_VALIDATION_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-871 curator-mediated validation\nStatus: ' + status + '\nResponse exists: ' + str(resp.exists()) + '\nInternal result exists: ' + str(internal.exists()) + '\nProtocol exists: ' + str(protocol.exists()) + '\nFinal: ' + final + '\nHas sections: ' + str(has_sections) + '\n\nResponse text:\n' + text[:3000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM871 curator-mediated response validation: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
